creator: deepaksks@yahoo.co.in
text:
Hi,
 Am very new to freebsd, i tried to insall the java in my freebsd machine, but i got the error like "Makefile:24: *** missing separator.  Stop."

I used the instructions in the page http://www.freebsd.org/java/install.html

so first went to the directory cd /usr/ports/java/jdk14
and gave make install clean.

that time only i got the error "Makefile:24: *** missing separator.  Stop."

Can you please help me on this

How-To-Repeat: by using the command make install clean
